title: Yellow Allay
description: This texture pack will replace the Allay texture in Minecraft with the Yellow Allay texture straight from Minecraft Legends.
body:
Have you ever played Minecraft Legends?As you know, in addition to Blue Allay, Yellow Allay is also present there.
This texture pack will replace the Allay texture in Minecraft with the Yellow Allay texture straight from Minecraft Legends.The texture of the summoning egg will not change!
